titleStmt.title: SII 4.265: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri

No. 265. (A.R. No. 35 of 1889). At the top of the slab are cut in order the figures of the sun, the chakra, the Vaishṇava Teṅgalai mark, śaṅkha and the crescent.ON A BROKEN SLAB IN THE CHANDIKESVARA TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
The line commences with an anusvāra.śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdra
cāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbh(ā)mūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti . śrījayādbhudaya
śālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1467 neya viśvāvasusaṁvatsarada jēṣṭa śu 11
yā śukravāradallū śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśva
ra śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrasadāśivadēvamahārāyarū vidyā
nagaradalli ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍharāgi pruthvīrājyaṁ gayiUttaṁ
yiralu sadāśivarāyara kāryyake karttarāda rāmarājayya
navara taṁmaṁdiru [pradhāni Era]tiṁmarājayanavara daḷa
vāyi jaṁgamayanavaru sadāśivadēvamahārāyari
gū rāmarājayanavarigū pradhāni Eratiṁmarājayana
varigū pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēku Eṁdu kruṣṇāpuradapēṭeya
hiriyakāluveya chatrada baḷiyalu kaṭistaṁthā tiru
ciṁnada Ābaraṇagaḷū rajatādi
samarpisi dēvara śrīkāryyagaḷige
panaivēdyagaḷigeU naimittikapaṁ
brāhmaṇavineyōga Aṁgaraṁ
gavayibhōgamodalāda vineyōgagaḷige kāladalli sarva
mā(ṁ)nyavāgi samarpista sōstegaḷū hiriyakāluneya catra
ke davasava hākuva bēhārigaḷū dēvara Amrutapaḍi
ge vartana (.) dha(ṁ)rmmamuṁtāgi biṭṭadu davasagaḷa krayagaḷa ba
ge koḍuUdu gaṭivaraha ga 1ke gaṭi Þ÷ dēvatānele
chatradiṁdalū dina 1 kke koḍuUduReadAkkiya.Ākiya kala 1 hesa
ru pa 4 Eṁṇeya pa 6 Upu paḍi 1 meṇasu sē
ru Ēlaki sē ÷ Arisina sē = śuṁṭhi sē =
jīri meṁthe sē = sāsave sēḥ [.] kāyimēlōgaraThe inscription appears to be left unfinished, since nothing is written on the back of the continuation.
Digital edition of SII 4.265 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
